_meta: Screenshot-verified set-bonus text (steward sweep 2026-06-15). Each entry: pieces, verbatim text, source screenshot. il_max/il_min optional tier filter. Applied to gear.json via set_bonus_apply_verified.py with parsedFrom:screenshot.

sets.text:
2 of Set: You are granted an increased stat for each member in your party:
  Party of 1 - +200 Power
  Party of 2 - +400 Power and Defense
  Party of 3 - +600 Power, Defense, and Accuracy
  Party of 4 - +800 Power, Defense, Accuracy, and Critical Strike
  Party of 5 - +1000 Power, Defense, Accuracy, Critical Strike, and Critical Severity

2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing will be increased by 1% for every enemy you faced when starting combat, to a max of 10% for 10 seconds. If facing only one enemy at the start of combat, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing will be increased by 5% for 1 minute. When you kill an enemy, this buff will refresh.
2 of Set: +500 Power

1 of Set: -10% Incoming Damage against Demon type enemies.
2 of Set: Reduces the amount of Madness inflicted by Demogorgon. Maddening Aura is not affected.
3 of Set: -50% Incoming Damage against Paranoid Delusions.
2 of Set: When you land a Critical Strike you Heal nearby allies for 1% of their Maximum Hit Points up to 1000. This effect may only occur once every 3 seconds.
3 of Set: Your powers have a chance to deal additional unresistable 10 magnitude damage.

2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you will become Far-Influenced, which increases your Outgoing Damage by 4% and grants you a random buff for 10 seconds.

Relentless - Increases your Critical Strike by 2500.

Tainted Attack - Enemies you attack will take additional damage over time.

Impeding Death - Enemies you attack will explode on death, doing damage to other foes.

You can only be Far-Influenced once every 30 seconds.

2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Base Damage Boost, Overall Outgoing Healing, and Damage Resistance is increased by 1%. For every 5 seconds you are in combat, these increase by 1%. These increases are doubled if affected by a Trophy Hunter buff. (Max 10% increase)

2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you become a Master of Illusion for 10 seconds! As a Master of Illusion you will summon an illusion of yourself to fight for you, attacking your enemies! Be forewarned, illusion magic can occasionally produce fowl results!

A Master of Illusion also does 3% more damage, which increases by 10% against enemies with Shields and Temp HP.

You can only be a Master of Illusion once every 30 seconds.

2 of Set: Your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 5%.

While in Barovia, your Damage Resistance and Movement Speed are also increased by 5%.

While in Barovia during nightfall, your Base Damage Boost, Damage Resistance, Overall Outgoing Healing, and Movement Speed are increased by 10%.

2 of Set: +500 Defense
+5% Movement Speed

2 of Set: When you are struck, Heal for 50% of your Maximum Hit Points over the next 30 seconds, this effect may only occur once every 60 seconds.

Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.
2 of Set: When you stand still for 3 seconds, incoming damage is reduced by 5%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and is removed upon moving.
2 of Set: When you dodge, block, sprint or shadow slip your Movement Speed is increased by 50% for 2 seconds, this effect may only occur once every 10 seconds.

2 of Set: Gain the affect of paranoia and bloodlust.

Paranoia - Gain 160 Defense when struck, lose a stack when you strike an enemy.

Bloodlust - Gain 160 Power when you strike an enemy, lose a stack when you are struck.

Neither paranoia nor bloodlust may exceed 24 stacks or be reduced below 1 stack.

2 of Set: Gain 2% Base Damage Boost, -2% Incoming Damage, or 2% Overall Outgoing Healing, depending on your role, while in the Underdark.

Gain 7.5% Base Damage Boost, -7.5% Incoming Damage, or 7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing, depending on your role, for 15 seconds when you dodge, block, sprint or shadow slip. This can only occur once every 30 seconds.

When dealing combat advantage damage, you have a 10% chance to gain 5% Base Damage Boost, -5% Incoming Damage, or 5% Overall Outgoing Healing, depending on your role, for 15 seconds. This can only occur once every 30 seconds.

2 of Set: When you use an encounter or daily power during combat, you gain a stack of Scalebreaker's Ire for 20 seconds. Each stack of Scalebreaker's Ire grants you additional Boosts bonuses depending on your role.
DPS: +1% Recharge Speed and Action Point Gain
Tank: +1% Stamina Regeneration and Action Point Gain
Healer: +1% Movement Speed and Action Point Gain

Once you reach 6 stacks of Scalebreaker's Ire, they are consumed and you are empowered with Scalebreaker's Wrath for 30 seconds, granting the following, depending on your role:
DPS: +7.5% Base Damage Boost
Tank: -7.5% Incoming Damage
Healer: +7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing

You may only have 1 stack of Scalebreaker's Wrath at a time and the duration is refreshed each time you reach 6 stacks of Scalebreaker's Ire.

2 of Set: Adventurer's Might
DPS: +5% Power
Tank: +5% Awareness
Healer: +5% Outgoing Healing
When you use an encounter power, you have a 15% chance to increase a Boost based on your role by 7.5% for 10 seconds.
DPS: Recharge Speed
Tank: Stamina Regeneration
Healer: Action Point Gain

2 of Set: Adventurer's Might
When you use an encounter power, you have a 10% chance to increase a Boost based on your role by 4% for 10 seconds.
DPS: Recharge Speed
Tank: Stamina Regeneration
Healer: Action Point Gain

2 of Set: Brute's Expertise
When you are 25' or closer to your target, a stat dependent on your role and Forte is increased by 3%.
DPS: Power
Tank: Awareness
Healer: Outgoing Healing

2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target.

You and nearby allies are granted the following, depending on your role:
DPS: +1% Base Damage Boost.
Tank: -2% Incoming Damage.
Healer: +2% Overall Outgoing Healing.

This effect may stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of similar weapons.

When in the Underdark, your Damage is increased by 5%.

2 of Set: When you use an encounter or daily power during combat, you gain a stack of Divine Charge for 15 seconds. Once you reach 5 stacks of Divine Charge, they are consumed and you are empowered with Divine Fury for 30 seconds, granting the following:
    +7.5% Base Damage Boost
    +7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing

You may only have 1 stack of Divine Fury at a time. The duration is refreshed each time you reach 5 stacks of Divine Charge.

2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, your weapons become Blessed, which increases your Power, Accuracy, Combat Advantage by 3% and grants you a random buff for 10 seconds.

Blessed Guidance - Increases your Critical Strike by 5%

Blessed Might - Increases your Action Point gain speed by 7.5%

Your weapons can only be Blessed once every 30 seconds.

1 of Set: Wanderer's Vigor
    When not in a party, you regenerate 2000 Hit Points, every 3 seconds.
2 of Set: When in a party:
    +5,000 Maximum Hit Points
    +1% Power
    +1% Defense
3 of Set: When on the Stronghold map:
    You and your allies gain 5 Movement Speed. This affect does not stack. No effect in Stronghold Siege.

2 of Set: You and nearby allies are granted the following:
    +2% Base Damage Boost
    +2% Overall Outgoing Healing
    -2% Incoming Damage
This effect may stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of Stronghold weapons.
2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you gain a stack of Alacrity, granting 1% Accuracy and 5% Movement for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.
2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you gain a stack of Speedy Alacrity, granting 2.5% Accuracy and 5% Recharge for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.

2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

Every 3s in combat, you will gain a stack of Umbral Stride.

Each stack grants the following bonuses:
General: +0.25% Power.
DPS: +0.35% Critical Severity.
Healer: +0.3% Overall Outgoing Healing.
Tank: +0.3% Awareness.

Max 10 stacks.

2 of Set: While in The Pirates' Skyhold or Dread Sanctum, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%.

Every 3s in combat, you will gain a stack of Prismatic Force.

Each stack of Prismatic Force will grant the following bonuses:
General: +0.35% Power.
DPS: +0.5% Critical Severity.
Healer: +0.4% Overall Outgoing Healing.
Tank: +0.4% Awareness.

Max 10 stacks.

2 of Set: Gain 5% Overall Outgoing Healing and -5% Incoming Damage.
When in Wildspace, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%.

Every 2s in combat with a single opponent, you will gain a stack of Darklight.
Every 2s in combat with 4 or more opponents, you will lose a stack of Darklight.

Based on your role, each stack of Darklight will grant the following bonus:
DPS: +0.6% Base Damage Boost.
Tank: -0.6% Incoming Damage.
Healer: +0.6% Overall Outgoing Healing.
Max 10 stacks.
Stack bonuses are doubled in Wildspace.

2 of Set: While in The Pirates' Skyhold, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%.

Every 3s in combat, you will gain a stack of Freebooter's Will.

Each stack of Freebooter's Will grants the following bonuses:
General: +0.25% Power.
DPS: +0.35% Critical Severity.
Healer: +0.3% Overall Outgoing Healing.
Tank: +0.3% Awareness.

Max 10 stacks.

2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5.5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target.

You are granted the following, depending on your role:
DPS: +3% Base Damage Boost.
Tank: -6% Incoming Damage.
Healer: +6% Overall Outgoing Healing.

This effect does not stack.

When in Wildspace, the above bonuses are doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

2 of Set: Your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 3%.

Your incoming damage is reduced by up to 7.5% when your Stamina is empty.

At the start of Combat, your Critical Strike and Critical Severity increase by 1%. For every 5 seconds you are in combat, these increase by 1%. (Maximum 5% increase).

2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 3% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target.

You are granted the following, depending on your role:
DPS: +2% Base Damage Boost.
Tank: -4% Incoming Damage.
Healer: +4% Overall Outgoing Healing.

This effect does not stack.

When in Wildspace, the role bonus is doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

2 of Set: +2,000 Maximum Hit Points.
3 of Set: +500 Power.

2 of Set: +5,000 Maximum Hit Points.
3 of Set: +3,000 Power.
